Localization.Description: Possible use of a Punto Switcher diary as a keylogger

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} exported a Punto Switcher diary to file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} directly opened or copied Punto Switcher diary file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} opened Punto Switcher diary viewer "{object.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
